zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Phillipa de Bolebec於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍倫德時，她的父親Hugh de Bolebek50歲，母親Theopharcia de Baliol33歲。她和Sir Roger de Lancaster至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1293年9月1日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Phillipa de Bolebec于大约1240年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍倫德时，她的父亲Hugh de Bolebek50岁，母亲Theopharcia de Baliol33岁。她和Sir Roger de Lancaster至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1293年9月1日之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Phillipa de Bolebec was born about 1240, in Blanchland, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Bolebek, was 50 and her mother, Theopharcia de Baliol, was 33. She had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Roger de Lancaster. She died before 1 September 1293.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Phillipa de Bolebec est née environ 1240, à Blanchland, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Bolebek, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Theopharcia de Baliol, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Roger de Lancaster. Elle est décédée avant 1 septembre 1293.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Phillipa de Bolebec um 1240 in Blanchland, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Bolebek 50 und ihre Mutter Theopharcia de Baliol 33. Sie hatte mit Sir Roger de Lancaster mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1. September 1293.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Phillipa de Bolebec è nata il circa 1240 nel Blanchland, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Bolebek, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Theopharcia de Baliol, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Roger de Lancaster. Morì prima del 1 settembre 1293.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Phillipa de Bolebecが約1240年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランチランドで生まれた時，父Hugh de Bolebekは50歳，母Theopharcia de Baliolは33歳であった。彼女はSir Roger de Lancasterとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1293年9月1日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Phillipa de Bolebec(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 블랭클랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Bolebek(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Theopharcia de Baliol(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir Roger de Lancaster(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 9월 1일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Phillipa de Bolebec nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Blanchland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Bolebek, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Theopharcia de Baliol, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Roger de Lancaster. Ela faleceu antes 1 de setembro de 1293.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Phillipa de Bolebec родилась около 1240 г. в местности бланчланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Bolebek было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Theopharcia de Baliol, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sir Roger de Lancaster. Она умерла перед 1 сентябрь 1293 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Phillipa de Bolebec nació aproximadamente 1240, en Blanchland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Bolebek, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Theopharcia de Baliol, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir Roger de Lancaster. Murió antes de 1 de septiembre de 1293.
